headline: Wynn Resorts, Okta, ServiceTitan And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: Wynn Resorts presents buying opportunity, Tilman Fertitta to acquire Caesars; Okta named as final trade; Dominion Energy posts earnings.
